compiled_state.title: Implement ticket_list (thin-wrapper) in library and wire dispatcher
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## What to Implement
Add ticket_list to plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib-api.sh and wire dispatcher list case.

## Scope (thin-wrapper — ticket-list.sh is 153 lines; calls ticket_reducer for materialization)
ticket_list [--format=<fmt>] [--status=<status>] [--type=<type>] [--parent=<parent>] [--include-archived]:
- Parse all filter flags matching current ticket-list.sh interface
- If DSO_TICKET_LEGACY=1: exec bash $SCRIPT_DIR/ticket-list.sh "$@"; return $?
- Thin wrapper: call python3 $SCRIPT_DIR/ticket-reducer-list.py (or equivalent reducer call) for state materialization; filter results in bash
- One python3 call maximum per invocation
- Use return (not exit) for all error paths
- Target: <0.15s

Dispatcher change: replace exec bash .../ticket-list.sh with _ticketlib_dispatch ticket_list "$@"

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] ticket_list defined in ticket-lib-api.sh
  Verify: grep -q "^ticket_list" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib-api.sh
- [ ] ticket_list uses at most one python3 subprocess on default path
  Verify: grep -A20 "^ticket_list" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib-api.sh | grep -v "^#" | grep -c "python3" | awk "{exit (\$1 <= 1) ? 0 : 1}"
- [ ] test_ticket_list_via_library passes (valid JSON array returned)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-ticket-lib-api.sh 2>&1 | grep -q "PASS.*list"
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/run-all.sh

comments.body: AC amendment (gap-5): ticket_list filter coverage — add ACs: (a) --status open returns only open tickets, (b) --parent <id> returns only children, (c) archived excluded by default, (d) --include-archived includes them. Prevents single-python3-call constraint from silently dropping filter flags.
comments.author: Test
